{{Infobox character
| name = Adrienne
| aliases = Adrienne Lamarkis Daiasus
| spouse = {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Malachi]]}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Lady]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|managing the realm}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Bel Calem]]}}
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[House of Blades (novel)|House of Blades]]
}}

''See also: [[Adrienne Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Adrienne Lamarkis Daiasus is a [[Damascan]] noblewoman and the wife of [[Overlord Malachi]] Daiasus. While her husband served as an [[Overlord]] for the [[Damascan Kingdom]] under [[King Zakareth the Sixth]], Adrienne was responsible for the practical management and smooth operation of their realm in [[Bel Calem]]. She is a mother to two daughters and has demonstrated significant leadership capabilities, including managing military advisors, coordinating city evacuations, and overseeing defensive preparations against potential threats like the [[Incarnation]]. Following the death of her husband at the hands of [[Alin]], Adrienne entered a period of mourning, vowing to wear black until she could secure justice for his passing. During the conflict surrounding [[Malachi]]'s death, she attempted to defend her family and husband with a knife, though she was ultimately unable to prevent his demise.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|Adrienne Lamarkis Daiasus is a [[Damascan]] lady and the wife of [[Malachi]]. Within her husband's domain, she is rumored to be the individual responsible for keeping the realm running smoothly. She continues to fulfill this role by actively managing the realm alongside her husband.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Adrienne]] is [[Malachi's wife]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13">''House of Blades'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Adrienne]] is rumored to be the one who keeps [[Malachi's realm]] running smoothly.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Adrienne]] Lamarkis Daiasus is a [[Damascan]] lady.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c20">''House of Blades'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Adrienne]] Lamarkis Daiasus is [[Malachi's wife]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c21">''House of Blades'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Adrienne]] is [[Malachi's wife]] and is managing the realm.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c23">''House of Blades'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Adrienne]] Lamarkis Daiasus is mourning her husband.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Adrienne]] is a [[Lady]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c10">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Adrienne]] Lamarkis Daiasus resides in [[Bel Calem]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
